description: Registry of all core engines (rutine-engine, deviation-engine, etc.)

items.name: Canonical Routines Engine
items.purpose: Defines 22 canonical routine types with complete risk management and compliance data
criticalRules: DO NOT change routine types without backend sync
DO NOT modify risk definitions without compliance review
Routine types are: varemodtagelse, opvarmning, nedkoeling, varmholdelse, koeleskab_temperatur, fryser_temperatur, etc.
Each routine has: routineType, displayTitle, group (CCP/GAG), frequencyDays, longDescription, risk object
Unique key: companyId + locationId + routineType + unitId + dateKey
Temperature vs cleaning: koeleskab_temperatur (CCP, daily) vs koeleskab_rengoering (GAG, weekly) - NEVER mixed
